install.reason: Codex plugin installation changes user-owned runtime state.

enable.reason: Codex plugin enablement changes user-owned runtime state.

trust.reason: Trust must be granted and observed by the user before runtime execution.

new_session.reason: A new interactive session is required to observe SessionStart execution.

uninstall.reason: Uninstall and runtime prune mutate user-owned activation state; local rollback is already evidenced.

pr.reason: The user explicitly requested that no pull request be created for this work.

boundary: Local build/check/rollback evidence is pinned above. Installation, enablement, trust, new-session runtime observation, and uninstall remain user-owned; no global trust or user configuration was mutated.
